name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). (1) deterministic CLI tool library (wpx-* scripts) handles all bookkeeping including the new wpx-journal seed-plan / mark-plan-item / add-plan-item subcommands; (2) executor agent owns Steps 1-7 (worktree → Step 1.5 plan generation → Red-Green-Blue → docs → lint → commit → push) and delegates bookkeeping to wpx-* tools; (3) calling session owns Steps 8-12 via wpx-pipeline background Bash, security-reviewer Agent spawn, and wpx-step12 atomic wrap. v0.10.4 fixes two coupled wpx-pipeline bugs surfaced by a real-world run on WP-CHAR-01 + WP-AUTO-013: (a) emit_ok did not accept exit_code kwarg — every wpx-pipeline exit path (success, blocker, timeout) crashed with Python TypeError since v0.9.0; fixed by extending _wpxlib.emit_ok with exit_code: int = 0 (backward-compatible additive change); (b) CI poll hung indefinitely on projects without feature-branch CI (no check-runs ever appear, _poll_ci sleeps to the 45-min cap, then crashes on the emit_ok bug); fixed by auto-detecting the absence via _detect_branch_ci (mirrors lifecycle.md Step 1 pre-flight) and skipping the poll with a clear WARNING. New --skip-ci-poll flag for explicit opt-out. v0.10.4 also adds a 'Setting up branch CI' section in scripts/README.md with the canonical workflow YAML, so projects can adopt the marketplace gradually and see clear setup instructions. v0.10.3 closed the auto-draft INDEX-registration gap (wpx-index add-wp + sync-auto-drafts). v0.10.2 fixed three correctness bugs in wpx-step12's sub-tool dispatcher. v0.10.1 fixed the wpx-* tool discoverability gap. Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
